What did you think would happen, holding a dangerous specimen
in Investigations? The Containment Sector exists for a reason.
They are better trained and better equipped for this type of work. In
fact, they have admirably taken on certain AWE monitoring
responsibilities that your staff are no longer capable of. This
happens more and more now.
And don't think your petty internal investigations have gone past
my notice. You are a worm! Everything I've done has been for the
benefit of the Bureau. The Prime Candidate Program only failed
because of Darling. You are both failures, plotting against me! You
are traitors, but the truth will emerge out of you!
You are choosing to become my enemy, Kirklund. You don’t want
to be.
Zachariah Trench, Director of the Federal Bureau of Control
